title: Formalize baseline version of .github/workflows/executor-runner.yml as accepted controlled-mutation executor
scope: Formalize and fix the current working baseline of .github/workflows/executor-runner.yml only
Preserve current policy scope without redesign
Preserve strict allowlist only for governance/current_task.json and ssot/MASTER_PROMPT_v162_CANON_FINAL.txt
Preserve current branch split between mutation and non-mutation paths
Preserve hard validation in controlled mutation path
Allow one hygiene improvement only: reject duplicate requested_targets
constraints: No workflow purpose change beyond baseline fixation
proof_target: .github/workflows/executor-runner.yml exists in main in baseline form
Strict allowlist exists only for governance/current_task.json and ssot/MASTER_PROMPT_v162_CANON_FINAL.txt
Branch split exists between controlled mutation path and non-mutation path
Hard validation exists for controlled mutation result
requested_targets duplicate rejection exists if hygiene improvement is applied
expected_repo_visible_change_in_main: .github/workflows/executor-runner.yml is present in main as the accepted baseline controlled-mutation executor
If hygiene improvement is included, the same workflow contains explicit rejection of duplicate requested_targets without changing scope or allowlist
routing_decision_basis: Formalize accepted baseline executor only, with no scope expansion and optional single hygiene guard
